view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a non-breaking rollout path for newer versions is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a non-breaking rollout path for newer versions is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided confirms that the system maintains a non-breaking rollout path for newer versions, as demonstrated by the linked use case which specifies that new bookings utilize the current version while older bookings retain their historical context. The prior step evidence shows that both bookings reference the same offer version ID, indicating that the system correctly binds offers to specific instrument versions without reinterpreting existing bookings. This directly supports the requirement that older bookings should not be affected by updates to the intake form version.
